case_title: BHATIA, GURDEEP SINGH vs. INDIA HOUSE OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BHATIA, GURDEEP SINGH AS TO DEFENDANT INDIA HOUSE OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT INDIA HOUSE OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BHATIA, GURDEEP SINGH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INDIA HOUSE OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. $3,810.08 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,890.08
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT INDIA HOUSE OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.

parties.name: INDIA HOUSE OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.

attorneys.name: LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA
